## Pull Requests are not accepted in this repository.

All plugin submissions, updates, and requests are handled exclusively through **Discussions**.

| I want to... | Go to |
|---|---|
| Submit a new plugin | [Discussions → 🔖 Verification Requests](../../discussions) |
| Submit a plugin update | [Discussions → 🔄 Update Requests](../../discussions) |
| Request Elevated permissions | [Discussions → ⚡ Elevated Permission Requests](../../discussions) |
| Report a plugin | [Discussions → 🚨 Report](../../discussions) |

Please close this pull request and use the correct channel.
